data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for change history, but the evidence provided does not include any records or logs that capture who made changes, when they were made, or the reasons behind those changes. The linked use case explicitly states the need for this change history, yet no concrete API reads or persisted state checks were performed to confirm its implementation. This results in a clear gap in meeting the requirement as outlined in the exploratory step.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of change history with who/when/why.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
